Although a pentavalent meningococcal vaccine was available in 2024, this analysis excluded this vaccine due to limited data availability.
††† In July 2020, the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices revised recommendations for Hep A vaccination to include catch-up vaccination for children and adolescents aged 2–18 years who have not previously received Hep A vaccine at any age.
